name: Filetti Di Sogliola Fritti (Deepfried Sole)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the fillets of sole in a bowl of cold water with some coarse grained salt. Set aside.
2. Sift the flour into a large bowl and add the salt.
3. Blend using a wooden spoon to create a well in the middle of the flour.
4. Pour the oil into the well and start mixing with the wooden spoon, incorporating some of the flour.
5. Add the water a little at a time until all the water has been incorporated while continuing to mix the oil and flour.
6. Let the batter rest for at least an hour in a cool place.
7. Preheat the deep fat fryer.
8. Line a serving dish with paper towels.
9. Beat the egg whites in a copper bowl until stiff.
10. Gently fold the egg whites into the batter using a rotating motion.
11. Remove the fillets from the cold water and pat dry.
12. Dip each fillet into the batter and then drop into the fryer.
13. Cook each fillet for about 1 minute, turning off the heat when done.
14. Remove from the fryer and place on the paper towels in the serving dish.
15. Once all the fillets have been cooked, remove the paper towels.
16. Sprinkle the fillets lightly with salt before serving with lemon wedges alongside.
